meta.title: Ameen Haieck — Graphic Designer
meta.description: Ameen Haieck is a graphic designer building visual identities that people remember — branding, editorial design and digital experiences since 2015.

hero.tagline: Since 2015, I've helped businesses, institutions and organizations transform ideas into meaningful visual identities through branding, editorial design and digital experiences.

about.heading: More than a decade of visual storytelling
about.paragraph1: Since 2015, I've worked with companies, institutions and organizations across different industries, creating visual identities that combine strategy, aesthetics and functionality. Every project is approached with precision, consistency and long-term thinking.

stats.heading: Experience in Numbers
stats.subheading: A decade of practice, distilled into a few honest numbers.

skills.heading: Design Services
skills.subheading: A practical, real-world skill set built over a decade of hands-on work.

items.identitySystems: Building cohesive, lasting visual identity systems
items.archivalRestoration: Restoring and enhancing historical archival photographs
items.aiAssisted: Practical use of AI design tools to speed up production and improve quality
items.clarity: Turning complex ideas into clear, impactful visual solutions

currentWork.organization: Al-Mustafa Institute for Religious Guidance and Awareness
currentWork.subheading: Three ongoing projects, three different visual languages.

contact.heading: Let's build something people will remember.

contact.formNote: Prefer email or WhatsApp — I read every message personally.
